commands.purpose: Print the ApiVersion catalog. Filterable by state + scheme.
Create or transition to state=released. Idempotent when the row exists + already released. --default marks this version as is_default (unsets previous default).
released → deprecated. Requires --sunset-at (RFC 3339 date). Optional --migration-target auto-upgrades pinned subscriptions on sunset.
deprecated → sunset. Refused when sunset_at > now() unless --force. Manually triggering + confirming skipping the scheduled runner.
Introspect the PayloadTransformerRegistry. --surface / --event / --from / --to filter the chain visualisation. Useful when debugging 'why is payload not transformed'.
Scans for versions past sunset_at + dispatches SunsetApiVersionJob for each. Runs from schedule hourly.
Create + publish sunset_reminder notices at 30d / 7d / 3d / 1d before sunset. Runs from schedule daily.
